description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Bookmark three beginner Wi‑Fi security articles published in or after 2023 with a reading time of 8 minutes or less to your Reading List.

target_names: Lock Down Your Home Wi‑Fi in 10 Minutes (Beginner Guide)
Beginner’s Checklist for Staying Safe on Public Wi‑Fi
5 Quick Wins to Upgrade Your Wi‑Fi Security Today
